afterSnapshot.name: planRoute
afterSnapshot.purpose: Orchestrate a weather-aware route plan: compute geometry/ETA, fetch per-leg destination weather, resolve arrival-hour and sun times, and attach risk warnings.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: A single orchestrator isolates the messy timezone/forecast-hour resolution and keeps the handler thin while combining geometry and weather into one response.
implementation: Result-style function that reuses the pure computeRoutePlan/computeLegWarnings and fetchRouteWeather; batches leg fetches for rate-limit friendliness and degrades gracefully when a single leg's weather is unavailable.
